entry.dcterms:title: Covid-19 testing strategies and lockdowns: the European closed curves
entry.dcterms:abstract: BACKGROUND As the number of Covid-19 infections worldwide overtakes 6 millions of Total Confirmed Cases (TCC), the data reveal almost closed outbreaks in many European countries.
entry.pr:note: ** From Crossref via Jisc Publications Router ** History: issued 11-06-2020.
